mapper.select: SELECT comment_check.user_comment_id as cid, comment_check.user_id as uid, comment_check.relic_id as rid, user.user_name as username, cultural_relics_data.object_name as relicname, comment_check.content as content, comment_check.created_time as created_time FROM comment_check,user,cultural_relics_data WHERE comment_check.user_id=#{uid} and comment_check.relic_id=#{rid} and comment_check.user_id=user.user_id and comment_check.relic_id=cultural_relics_data.id

SELECT comment_check.user_comment_id as cid, comment_check.user_id as uid, comment_check.relic_id as rid, user.user_name as username, cultural_relics_data.object_name as relicname, comment_check.content as content, comment_check.created_time as created_time FROM comment_check,user,cultural_relics_data WHERE comment_check.user_id=#{uid} and comment_check.user_id=user.user_id and comment_check.relic_id=cultural_relics_data.id

SELECT comment_check.user_comment_id as cid, comment_check.user_id as uid, comment_check.relic_id as rid, user.user_name as username, cultural_relics_data.object_name as relicname, comment_check.content as content, comment_check.created_time as created_time FROM comment_check,user,cultural_relics_data WHERE comment_check.relic_id= #{rid} and comment_check.user_id=user.user_id and comment_check.relic_id=cultural_relics_data.id
